title: Worcester Worry-Free Stew
description: A comforting Ethiopian dish featuring Worcester sauce as the star ingredient, with a spicy and velvety texture, suitable for egg-free meals.

ingredients.name: 1 medium onion
ingredients.notes: Chopped and caramelized to add depth of flavor

ingredients.name: 1 can (8 oz/227g)
ingredients.notes: Fresh peas would be better but this is a substitute for egg in the dish

ingredients.name: 1 can (6.5 oz/180g)
ingredients.notes: Drained and rinsed to reduce sodium if needed

ingredients.name: 1 tablespoon
ingredients.notes: To give it a warm, golden color and subtle spiciness

instructions: Heat a pot over medium heat. Add the Worcester sauce and bring it to simmer.
Add chopped onion, minced garlic, cumin seeds, and turmeric powder; stir until fragrant.
Pour in the peas and kidney beans, and let them cook for about 5 minutes.
Season with salt to taste and serve hot.
